name: demo-realism
description: Use when an MVP, prototype, or client demo feels fake and needs believable operational workflows, realistic demo data...

interface.shortDescription: Use when an MVP, prototype, or client demo feels fake and needs believable operational workflows, realistic demo data...
interface.longDescription: Use when an MVP, prototype, or client demo feels fake and needs believable operational workflows, realistic demo data, and a presentation-worthiness rubric before design or implementation begins.
